sentences.reference: Professor: What is the main benefit of renewable energy?
sentences.fullSentence: Renewable energy reduces our dependence on fossil fuels

sentences.reference: Lecturer: How do universities support mental health?
sentences.fullSentence: Many campuses offer free counseling services to students

sentences.reference: Student: Studying in groups is not very effective.
sentences.fullSentence: Collaborative learning improves understanding and retention of complex material

sentences.reference: Professor: What effect does sleep have on memory?
sentences.fullSentence: Adequate sleep is essential for memory consolidation

sentences.reference: Classmate: Is online learning worse than in-person classes?
sentences.fullSentence: Online learning offers flexibility that appeals to many students
Biodiversity makes ecosystems more resilient to environmental changes

sentences.reference: Professor: What motivates students to volunteer?
sentences.fullSentence: Many students have a desire to serve their community

sentences.reference: Student: Public transport is too slow for daily use.
sentences.fullSentence: Public transportation reduces congestion and pollution in urban areas

sentences.reference: Classmate: Does social media help students network?
sentences.fullSentence: Social media platforms connect students with academic opportunities

sentences.reference: Professor: Why should students learn data literacy?
sentences.fullSentence: Data skills empower students to make an informed decisions
